title: Implementation Verification Record
description: Written to .sc4sap/program/{PROG}/verification.json during create-program Phase 4 (check_syntax, activate) and Phase 5 (unit_test, atc). Each step records a status plus concrete evidence (tool output summary), so the Phase 6 reviewer and the Phase 8 report can trust the claims without re-running the tools.

check_syntax.description: Result of CheckSyntax on the MAIN program (single check, not per include).

activate.description: Activation result — evidence should cite GetInactiveObjects returning 0 entries for the program's object set.

unit_test.description: RunUnitTest / GetUnitTestResult outcome. SKIPPED when Phase 5 skip conditions matched (Procedural paradigm, or testing scope = none).

atc.description: GetAtcFindings outcome on the created objects. SKIPPED when the backend does not support ATC checks.

status.description: Step outcome. SKIPPED requires the reason in evidence.

evidence.description: Concrete proof: tool name + result summary (e.g. 'CheckSyntax(ZMM_STOCK_RPT): 0 errors 0 warnings', 'GetInactiveObjects: 0 entries for ZMM_STOCK_RPT*', 'RunUnitTest: 6/6 methods green'), or the skip reason.
